title: SoulSMP
description: The Remake of SoulSMP concept introduced in SenpaiExtra's video.
body:
# SoulSMP

> This is a concept remake of SoulSMP in Senpai's video, whenever a player dies they drop a soul and on losing all souls they gets banned. 

## Why This Plugin?

Easy configurations,
Reload Support
Custom Model Data Support
Item Support
Much More

## Commands:

1. /soulwithdraw : Withdraw your souls.
2. /soulsmpreload : Reload changes made to config without restarting the server.
